user.title: DR LYD
user.description: DR LYD uses an internal API. The default key usually works, but if it is rejected you can get a new one: open dr.dk/lyd, start playback, open your browser developer tools (Network), and copy the value of the 'x-apikey' header.

error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected by DR. Get a fresh x-apikey from dr.dk/lyd.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to DR LYD.
